/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/4.0.16/libexec/emcc -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_malloc,_free,_player_init,_player_load,_player_render,_player_stop,_player_pause,_player_resume,_player_set_sample_rate,_player_is_finished,_player_get_subsong_count,_player_set_subsong,_player_get_title,_player_detect_duration,_player_get_channel_levels,_player_set_channel_gain,_player_get_num_instruments,_player_get_instrument_param,_player_set_instrument_param,_player_note_on,_player_note_off] "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['ccall','cwrap','getValue']" -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=33554432 -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=\"createSteveTurner\" -O2 @CMakeFiles/SteveTurner.dir/objects1.rsp -o /Users/spot/Code/DEViLBOX/public/steveturner/SteveTurner.js @CMakeFiles/SteveTurner.dir/linkLibs.rsp
